project_type: Next.js 15 app with Firebase, app router
test_framework: None found - no test files present
verification_instructions: Run npm run build and confirm it succeeds with exit code 0
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available for npm install
key_patterns: API routes use Next.js app router pattern (route.js with named export functions). pdf-parse is imported from 'pdf-parse/lib/pdf-parse' to bypass a known test file bug. Error messages are in Indonesian (Bahasa). The API downloads PDFs from Google Drive using public download URLs.
directory_structure: src/app/api/extract-cert-date/route.js - the API route to modify. package.json at project root.
